description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design, with a mix of black and white exterior walls. The front includes a large garage door and a main entrance, while the backyard is equipped with a wooden deck, outdoor seating, a swimming pool, and a shaded patio area. The property also boasts a children's play area with a swing set, slide, and a round above-ground trampoline. Large windows and glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The upper story is partially open, revealing a spacious room with gym equipment and a ping pong table. The surrounding lawn is neatly maintained, enhancing the contemporary and family-friendly atmosphere.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with black and white walls, a garage, pool, deck, and extensive outdoor amenities including a play area and trampoline.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance, and part of the backyard deck with outdoor seating and pool.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the pool, deck, patio furniture, and children's play area with a slide and trampoline.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the trampoline, swing set, and the open upper story with visible interior furnishings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the black exterior wall, upper story room, and partial view of the trampoline and play area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass doors and scattered windows
